understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', navigating through each level by leveraging gravity and horizontal movement, while avoiding hazards like spikes and optimizing turn usage.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was strictly horizontal (left or right), and after moving, gravity would pull the player to the next solid landing. Clicks could be used to remove breakable blocks, which opened new paths, while spikes were immediate hazards to avoid landing on. The undo action allowed reverting mistakes. Efficient use of moves and clicks was key, and careful planning was needed due to the turn limit and limited attempts.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game was to reach the goal gem tile marked '+', navigating through each level by leveraging gravity and horizontal movement, while avoiding hazards like spikes and optimizing turn usage.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement was strictly horizontal (left or right), and after moving, gravity would pull the player to the next solid landing. Clicks could be used to remove breakable blocks, which opened new paths, while spikes were immediate hazards to avoid landing on. The undo action allowed reverting mistakes. Efficient use of moves and clicks was key, and careful planning was needed due to the turn limit and limited attempts.
